# Postmortem Template

Use this after every post.

```markdown
# Video Postmortem

Video:
Platform:
Date posted:
Hypothesis tested:
Primary signal:
Variant:

## Metrics

24h views:
72h views:
7d views:
30d views:
Shown/impressions:
Chose-to-view / viewed-vs-swiped:
1–3s retention:
Average watch time:
Average % viewed:
Completion:
Rewatch/replay:
Likes:
Comments:
Saves:
Shares/sends:
Profile visits:
Follows/subscribers:
Search traffic:
Negative feedback:

## Diagnosis

Which gate failed or won?

[ ] Classification
[ ] Scroll stop
[ ] Early hold
[ ] Body retention
[ ] Completion
[ ] Save
[ ] Send/share
[ ] Comment
[ ] Follow
[ ] Search
[ ] Trust

## Interpretation

What likely caused the result?

What surprised us?

What comments reveal useful language or objections?

What should be changed next?

## Decision

[ ] Scale mechanism
[ ] Repackage first frame/hook
[ ] Rewrite body
[ ] Add proof
[ ] Change CTA
[ ] Make search version
[ ] Retire

## Next variant

Variant name:
Change one variable:
Prediction:
```
